generated_oml:
instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Python program that collects crane state data from physical crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateData
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance CraneStateDataInTimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for storing crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT message broker for communication between services"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Software application for logging crane data to TimescaleDB"
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system serving as a CPS exemplar for digital twin research"
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, CraneController, LoggingApplication, PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical component of the gantry crane system"
]

    base:desc "Controller for the physical gantry crane"
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides optimal control for system optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemOptimization
]

    base:desc "Logs crane state data to TimescaleDB for traceability"

]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for system monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeVisualization
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure model accuracy against physical data"
    DTDFVocab:provides Simulation, Prediction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection to identify anomalies in the system"

]

    base:desc "Optimal control for system optimization"
]

    base:desc "Traceability through historical data logging for system audit and analysis"
]

]

]

]

]

]

]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [

]
